tasks.subject: CD1: Dockerfile + docker-compose
tasks.description:
**Goal:** docker compose up builds/runs Quorum AI on :3000 with SQLite on a named volume, migrating on start.

**Verify:** docker build then docker compose up + curl /login → 200

```json:metadata
{"files": ["Dockerfile", ".dockerignore", "docker-compose.yml", "next.config.ts"], "verifyCommand": "docker build -t quorum-ai . && docker compose up -d && curl -sf -o /dev/null -w '%{http_code}' http://localhost:3000/login", "acceptanceCriteria": ["docker build succeeds", "compose serves /login 200", "user persists across restart", "migrate on start"]}
```

tasks.subject: CD2: GitHub Actions CI
tasks.description:
**Goal:** push/PR to main runs install, lint, unit, build, e2e, and docker image build — all green.

**Verify:** valid YAML; green run after push.

```json:metadata
{"files": [".github/workflows/ci.yml"], "verifyCommand": "test -f .github/workflows/ci.yml && echo present", "acceptanceCriteria": ["lint-test-build green", "e2e job runs", "docker build job", "triggers on push+PR to main"]}
```
